cards.oracle_text: As long as you control an enchantment, this creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink. (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

cards.name: Sauron's Ransom
cards.oracle_text: Choose an opponent. They look at the top four cards of your library and separate them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard. The Ring tempts you.

cards.name: Make a _____ Splash
cards.oracle_text:
Flash
When this enchantment enters, you may put a name sticker on it.
Whenever you put a sticker on this enchantment, tap up to X target creatures, where X is the number of u's in name stickers on this enchantment.

cards.name: Cloudreach Cavalry
cards.oracle_text: As long as you control a Bird, this creature gets +2/+2 and has flying.

cards.name: Failed Fording
cards.oracle_text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you control a Desert, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

cards.name: Synod Centurion
cards.oracle_text: When you control no other artifacts, sacrifice this creature.

cards.name: Mungha Wurm
cards.oracle_text: You can't untap more than one land during your untap step.

cards.name: Devious Cover-Up
cards.oracle_text: Counter target spell. If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard. You may shuffle up to four target cards from your graveyard into your library.

cards.name: Goblin Maskmaker
cards.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, face-down spells you cast this turn cost {1} less to cast.

cards.name: Necrogen Communion
cards.oracle_text:
Enchant creature you control
Enchanted creature has toxic 2. (Players dealt combat damage by it also get two poison counters.)
When enchanted creature dies, return that card to the battlefield under your control.

cards.name: Wildheart Invoker
cards.oracle_text: {8}: Target creature gets +5/+5 and gains trample until end of turn. (It can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)

cards.name: Brainstone
cards.oracle_text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

cards.name: Screamreach Brawler
cards.oracle_text: Dash {1}{R} (You may cast this spell for its dash cost. If you do, it gains haste, and it's returned from the battlefield to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.)

cards.name: Omnath, Locus of the Roil
cards.oracle_text:
When Omnath enters, it deals damage to any target equal to the number of Elementals you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target Elemental you control. If you control eight or more lands, draw a card.

cards.name: Quarry Beetle
cards.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
